creator: rnoland@2hip.net
text:
On Sun, 2006-12-31 at 13:43 +0100, Pav Lucistnik wrote:
> Dear maintainer of FreeBSD port sysutils/portmanager, the following
> problem report has been filed against your port
> 
>   http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=106643
> 
> Can you please provide feedback on this?

perhaps the following patch to pkgtools is appropriate.  It seems to
make things happy, but I have no idea if it breaks portupgrade
somehow...

--- pkgtools-2.2.2/lib/pkgtools.rb.orig	Sat Nov 18 13:12:37 2006
+++ pkgtools-2.2.2/lib/pkgtools.rb	Wed Jan  3 14:32:51 2007
@@ -68,6 +68,8 @@
 
   File.exist?(file) or return false
 
+  init_pkgtools_global
+
   begin
     load file
   rescue Exception => e
@@ -75,8 +77,6 @@
       e.message.gsub(/^/, "\t")
     exit 1
   end
-
-  init_pkgtools_global
 
   val = config_value(:SANITY_CHECK)
   val.nil? or $sanity_check = val

robert.
